social.text:
En ce 8 mai, nous nous souvenons de ces héros qui ont œuvré à la Libération de la France. Leur courage a rendu possible la Victoire, leur sacrifice a ouvert la voie de la paix.

À nous de faire vivre ce legs. Gardons vibrantes la flamme de la mémoire et notre exigence de liberté.

2026’nın ilk 4 ayında 2 milyar 871 milyon dolarlık ihracat gerçekleştirdik.

social.name: Javier Milei
social.text: RT by @JMilei: Milei recibió el país con riesgo país en 1.923 puntos. Hoy: 522. ¿Seguimos debatiendo si hubo gestión?

social.name: Nayib Bukele
social.text:
¡Feliz día del soldado salvadoreño!

Video

social.name: Keir Starmer
social.text:
To all the Labour members and volunteers who have supported local campaigns across the country: thank you. 

Together we will build a stronger and fairer Britain 🌹

social.name: Keir Starmer
social.text:
RT by @Keir_Starmer: To the voters who put their trust in us to deliver for your community, and for the volunteers who pounded the streets to elect Labour candidates, we thank you. 

Together, we will make Britain a stronger, fairer country for all. 

Lots done, lots more to do.🌹

social.name: Nayib Bukele
social.text:
RT by @nayibbukele: 🇸🇻 EL SALVADOR 🇸🇻

In 2014, five guys jumped me with shanks at a park in San Salvador

I swore I'd never come back

Last week I did, for the first time in nearly 12 years

Why? Because @nayibbukele has changed this country at breakneck speed and I wanted to se

social.name: Nayib Bukele
social.text: RT by @nayibbukele: The greatest part of my visit to El Salvador was witnessing firsthand the incredible strides they’re making in education. President Bukele is prioritizing new schools and the integration of AI tools rolling out nationwide to provide real hope for the next gene

social.name: Israeli PM Office
social.text:
R to @IsraeliPM: Thank you to our heroic fighters, to the intelligence personnel, and to our Air Force. You are the best in the world.

I salute you; the People of Israel salute you!

social.name: Israeli PM Office
social.text: R to @IsraeliPM: I say to our enemies in the clearest possible way: No terrorist has immunity. Anyone who threatens the State of Israel will pay the price.

social.name: Israeli PM Office
social.text:
R to @IsraeliPM: In the past month, we have eliminated more than 200 Hezbollah terrorists who acted against Israeli citizens and IDF soldiers.

We are doing the same in Gaza, eliminating terror cells, including yesterday.

social.name: Emmanuel Macron
social.text:
Je viens de m’entretenir avec le Président iranien Massoud Pezeshkian.

J’ai marqué ma vive préoccupation sur l'escalade en cours, et condamné les frappes injustifiées contre les infrastructures civiles émiriennes et plusieurs navires.

Toutes les parties doivent lever le blocus

social.name: Donald Trump
social.text: Pinned: Video

social.name: Donald Trump
social.text:
RT by @realDonaldTrump: On behalf of Erin and me, thank you to everyone for the love and support we've received. We both had an unforgettable wedding day, and we'll never forget it. We're humbled and grateful to all.

THANK YOU! 🙏🏻🇺🇸🦅🚀
